description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in driverless autonomous mode, was traveling eastbound on Clay Street between 
Hyde Street and Leavenworth Street. Shortly before the intersection with Leavenworth Street, the Cruise AV made contact with a downed 
power cable on Clay Street and came to a stop. This caused damage to the Cruise AV’s front driver side radar assembly. There were no 
injuries.
Print
Clear Form
